# ALIM

> ALIM is a HOLCO product for French nutrition professionals. It adds a clinical recipe-formulation layer to native AI assistants such as ChatGPT and Claude.

## Product

ALIM helps dietitians and nutrition professionals turn an anonymized patient brief into a structured recipe sheet:

- meal context and constraints;
- weighted ingredients;
- nutrition values per portion from ANSES Ciqual 2025;
- clinical guardrails for the covered beta situations;
- visible sources and references;
- printable PDF output;
- optional account-linked recipe library.

ALIM is not a diagnosis tool, not a medical device, and not a full patient-record or practice-management system. Outputs must be reviewed, adapted, or refused by the qualified professional.

## Beta Scope

Current public beta scope:

- type 2 diabetes + hypertension, adult, normal renal function, outside pregnancy;
- pregnancy + gestational diabetes.

Chronic kidney disease and other complex situations are out of public beta scope unless explicitly documented later.

## Useful URLs

- Home: https://alim.care/
- Join beta: https://alim.care/configurer/
- Account: https://alim.care/compte/
- Sources and rules: https://alim.care/sources/
- ChatGPT install: https://alim.care/install/chatgpt/
- Claude install: https://alim.care/install/claude/
- API docs: https://alim.care/api-docs/
- Legal notice: https://alim.care/mentions-legales/
- Robots: https://alim.care/robots.txt
- Sitemap: https://alim.care/sitemap.xml
- Security: https://alim.care/.well-known/security.txt

## API Surfaces

- ChatGPT OpenAPI: https://alim.care/chatgpt/openapi.yaml
- Claude MCP endpoint: https://alim.care/mcp/v1
- OAuth authorization: https://alim.care/oauth/authorize
- OAuth token: https://alim.care/oauth/token

API access requires an active ALIM account and Bearer/OAuth authorization.

## Contact

ALIM is operated by HOLCO INVEST.

- Email: alim@holco.co
- Company: https://holco.co/
